summary: Performance optimization testing completed successfully. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified working. Key fix: Missing 'Ticket' import in server.py fixed to enable single ticket fetch endpoints.

Monthly spending API at /api/v1/insights/monthly-spending is optimized and returns correct value €168,580.99
Admin tickets list uses MongoDB aggregation for efficient unread count calculation - 73 tickets loaded in <1s

Single ticket endpoints /api/v1/tickets/{id} and /api/v1/admin/tickets/{id} now work correctly after fix
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added Ticket import to fix 500 error on single ticket endpoints
